name: claude-series
description: Claude 實戰 — 真人錄影 + Remotion 後製疊層的課程系列

scripts.build:claude-chat-website: remotion render claude-chat-website out/claude-chat-website/Claude實戰-用Claude做質感網頁-$(date +%F).mp4 --codec h264
scripts.build:meeting-notes-organizer: remotion render meeting-notes-organizer out/meeting-notes-organizer/Claude實戰-用Claude整理會議紀錄-$(date +%F).mp4 --codec h264
scripts.build:reply-template-library: remotion render reply-template-library out/reply-template-library/Claude實戰-用Claude做回信模板庫-$(date +%F).mp4 --codec h264
scripts.build:community-calendar: remotion render community-calendar out/community-calendar/Claude實戰-用Claude規劃社群行事曆-$(date +%F).mp4 --codec h264
scripts.build:pdf-summary-analysis: remotion render pdf-summary-analysis "out/pdf-summary-analysis/Claude實戰-用Claude Chat讀懂任何PDF-$(date +%F).mp4" --codec h264
scripts.build:claude-projects-workspace: remotion render claude-projects-workspace "out/claude-projects-workspace/Claude實戰-Claude Projects 個人記憶空間-$(date +%F).mp4" --codec h264
scripts.build:think-clearly: remotion render think-clearly "out/think-clearly/Claude實戰-Claude思考夥伴-分析決策突破盲點-$(date +%F).mp4" --codec h264
